current_5fps_text:
Together we can
#BroadbandSwitch4Less
Vodafone new customers, 24m plans (on Openreach network) pay less on avg vs BT's public prices for comparable existing customers plans, as of March 2024, verify: Vodafone.co.uk/broadband
next_5fps_text: Manage your account online 24/7. App requires iOS 11.0 or Android 5.0 or newer.
